Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ELENA CUMMINGS Motion To Transfer Action from the San Francisco Superior Court to the Los Angeles Superior Court, State of California, Per CCP 397(A)(C). Appearances: Paul V. Horcher, Esq., Attorney at Law, (909) 861-5555 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Martin A. Hendlish, Esq. of the Law Offices of Martin Hendish, (310) 479-4109, Appearing thru CourtCall, appearing for Defendant Elena Cummings and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to transfer action is denied. Request for sanctions is denied. Also, Evidentiary objections to Declaration of Elena Cummings, object. #1 is overruled, all others are sustained; Evidentiary objections to Declaration of Martin Hendlish are sustained in its entirety. Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Text Ruling

Hendlish, Esq. Law Offices of Martin Hendlish, (310) 479-4108, (appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Defendant and Cross-complainant, Elena Cummings; Paul V. Horcher, Esq. Attorney at Law, (909) 861-5555, appearing for Plaintiff, and cross defendant Jack Dane, opposing party; There are no other appearances. Argued and the Court adopts and amends its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with fifteen days leave to amend, on the condition that Mr. Hendlish's client verifies first amended Cross-complaint.
